tags.name: Dermot Baldwin Way SE
tags.note: This street has been occupied with tents and homeless people, motor vehicles would be experiencing difficulties to pass through. Please see the signs and road conditions before making a left turn from 4 Av SE

tags.name: Memorial Drive NW
tags.note: Temporarily closed to motor vehicle traffic due to COVID 19 (allows for distancing along the adjacent paths). Expected reopening Fall 2021.

tags.name: Memorial Drive NE
tags.note: Temporarily closed to vehicle traffic (allow physical distancing on path) https://calgary.ctvnews.ca/pedestrians-and-cyclists-rule-calgary-s-memorial-drive-once-more-1.5336641
